name: Melio B2B Payments API
what_it_does: Melio REST API for B2B payment processing platform focused on small and medium businesses. Enables AI agents to manage vendor and supplier payment workflows, handle ACH bank transfer and check payment initiation, access payment scheduling and approval workflows, retrieve vendor directory and banking detail management, manage payment status and delivery tracking, handle debit card and credit card payment funding, access payment history and reconciliation data, retrieve fee and payment method optimization, manage payment links for vendor onboarding, and integrate B2B payment automation with QuickBooks, Xero, and accounting platforms.
use_cases: Managing vendor payments and AP automation from small business finance agents
Scheduling and approving vendor payments from accounts payable automation agents
Integrating B2B payments with QuickBooks from accounting automation agents
Handling contractor and supplier payments from SMB operations agents
not_for: Enterprise accounts payable requiring complex ERP integration without SMB focus
Consumer payments without B2B vendor payment context
International payments beyond US ACH and check coverage
best_when: A small or medium business using Melio wants AI agents to automate vendor payment scheduling, approval workflows, ACH and check payment execution, and accounting system synchronization.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: B2B payment automation creates cash flow obligations — payment scheduling must account for bank balance and cash flow projections. ACH reversals are possible but delayed. Check payments cannot be stopped once printed and mailed.

auth.notes: Melio uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Platform partner credentials with payment and vendor management scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for payment status events. QuickBooks and Xero integration partnerships. Partner API for embedded payment workflows.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free ACH payments; 2.9% fee for card-funded payments
pricing.paid_tiers: No subscription fee — revenue from card payment fees and express delivery
pricing.notes: New York. Founded 2018. B2B payments for SMBs. $4B+ valuation (2021). 500,000+ businesses. QuickBooks and Xero integration partnerships. FDIC-insured through partner banks. Competes with BILL and Routable for SMB AP automation. Strong accounting software integration.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth application; payment initiation throttled

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Payment scheduling automation must check cash balance before scheduling — NSF returns create fees and vendor relationship issues
ACH vs check selection — agent must choose payment method based on vendor preference and delivery timeline
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API via partner portal
US-only coverage — not suitable for international vendor payments
Check payments are irreversible once mailed — verify before scheduling check payments
Card-funded payments carry 2.9% fee — cost optimization requires ACH preference for non-urgent payments
agent_readiness.security_notes: B2B payment data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US only. Vendor banking details and payment transaction sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B payments. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US. Vendor payment and banking data.
